key_indicators: State capital, IT hubs, metro connectivity
text: District: Lucknow, UP. Pop: 45.89 lakh. Literacy: 79.3%. Sex Ratio: 917. State capital. Key: IT City Lucknow, Metro operational (40 km), AIIMS, major industrial corridor. HDI: 0.69. Urban: 67%.

District: Muzaffarpur, Bihar. Pop: 48.01 lakh. Literacy: 63.4%. Sex Ratio: 921. Famous for Shahi Litchi. Flood-prone (Gandak, Burhi Gandak rivers). Education hub with multiple universities. Key issues: floods, low industrial development.

District: Pune, Maharashtra. Pop: 94.29 lakh. Literacy: 87.2%. Sex Ratio: 915. India's IT hub with Hinjewadi IT Park. Automobile capital (Tata, Bajaj, Mercedes). Top universities. Smart City. Metro under construction.

District: Jaipur, Rajasthan. Pop: 66.63 lakh. Literacy: 75.5%. Sex Ratio: 909. State capital. UNESCO World Heritage (Pink City). Gems and jewelry industry hub. Growing IT sector. Metro operational. Major tourism revenue.

key_indicators: PM's constituency, Smart City, Kashi Vishwanath
text: District: Varanasi, UP. Pop: 36.77 lakh. Literacy: 77.1%. Sex Ratio: 913. PM Modi's constituency. Kashi Vishwanath Corridor (₹339 cr). Smart City. Silk weaving (Banarasi sarees). BHU — oldest central university. River tourism.

key_indicators: IT capital, startup hub, Namma Metro
text: District: Bengaluru Urban, Karnataka. Pop: 95.88 lakh. Literacy: 88.5%. Sex Ratio: 916. India's Silicon Valley. 4,000+ tech companies. Startup capital. Namma Metro (69 km). ISRO HQ. Highest per capita income among metro cities.

District: Patna, Bihar. Pop: 58.38 lakh. Literacy: 70.7%. Sex Ratio: 897. State capital. Ancient Pataliputra. AIIMS Patna. Ganga riverfront development. Key issues: urban flooding, traffic, infrastructure gaps.

key_indicators: Cleanest city 7x, textile hub, Super Corridor
text: District: Indore, MP. Pop: 32.76 lakh. Literacy: 80.9%. Sex Ratio: 916. India's cleanest city (7 consecutive Swachh Survekshan wins). Textile and pharmaceutical hub. Super Corridor IT zone. IIT/IIM hub.
